mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_daily ( code, trade_date, name, open_price, close_price, high_price, low_price, pre_close, volume, amount, change_percent, change_amount, turnover_rate, market_cap, circ_market_cap, pe_ttm, pb, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{tradeDate}, #{name}, #{openPrice}, #{closePrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{preClose}, #{volume}, #{amount}, #{changePercent}, #{changeAmount}, #{turnoverRate}, #{marketCap}, #{circMarketCap}, #{peTtm}, #{pb}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), open_price = VALUES(open_price), close_price = VALUES(close_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), pre_close = VALUES(pre_close), volume = VALUES(volume), amount = VALUES(amount), change_percent = VALUES(change_percent), change_amount = VALUES(change_amount), turnover_rate = VALUES(turnover_rate), market_cap = VALUES(market_cap), circ_market_cap = VALUES(circ_market_cap), pe_ttm = VALUES(pe_ttm), pb = VALUES(pb), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN change_percent > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS riseCount, SUM(CASE WHEN change_percent < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fallCount, SUM(CASE WHEN change_percent IS NULL OR change_percent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flatCount, ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(change_percent), 0), 4) AS avgPctChg, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM stock_daily WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate}
